2604.17271.title: HopRank: Self-Supervised LLM Preference-Tuning on Graphs for Few-Shot Node Classification
2604.17271.paper_summary: Node classification on text-attributed graphs (TAGs) is a fundamental task with broad applications in citation analysis, social networks, and recommendation systems. Current GNN-based approaches suffer from shallow text encoding and heavy dependence on labeled data, limiting their effectiveness in label-scarce settings. While large language models (LLMs) naturally address the text understanding gap with deep semantic reasoning, existing LLM-for-graph methods either still require abundant labels during training or fail to exploit the rich structural signals freely available in graph topology. Our key observation is that, in many real-world TAGs, edges predominantly connect similar nodes under the homophily principle, meaning graph topology inherently encodes class structure without any labels. Building on this insight, we reformulate node classification as a link prediction task and present HopRank, a fully self-supervised LLM-tuning framework for TAGs. HopRank constructs preference data via hierarchical hop-based sampling and employs adaptive preference learning to prioritize informative training signals without any class labels. At inference, nodes are classified by predicting their connection preferences to labeled anchors, with an adaptive early-exit voting scheme to improve efficiency. Experiments on three TAG benchmarks show that HopRank matches fully-supervised GNNs and substantially outperforms prior graph-LLM methods, despite using zero labeled training data.
2604.17271.paper_summary_zh: 節點分類在文本屬性圖（TAGs）上是一項基本任務，廣泛應用於引文分析、社交網絡和推薦系統。當前基於GNN的方法受到淺層文本編碼和對標記數據的高度依賴的限制，使其在標籤稀缺的環境中效果不佳。雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）自然地解決了文本理解的差距，並具備深層語義推理能力，但現有的圖形LLM方法要麼在訓練期間仍然需要大量標籤，要麼無法利用圖拓撲中自由可用的豐富結構信號。我們的關鍵觀察是，在許多現實世界的TAG中，邊緣主要根據同質性原則連接相似的節點，這意味著圖拓撲本質上在沒有任何標籤的情況下編碼了類別結構。基於這一見解，我們將節點分類重新表述為鏈接預測任務，並提出了HopRank，一個完全自我監督的LLM調整框架，用於TAGs。HopRank通過基於層次的跳躍抽樣構建偏好數據，並採用自適應偏好學習來優先考慮有用的訓練信號，而不需要任何類別標籤。在推理過程中，通過預測節點對標記錨點的連接偏好來進行分類，並使用自適應的提前退出投票方案來提高效率。在三個TAG基準上的實驗表明，HopRank的表現與完全監督的GNN相當，並顯著超越了先前的圖形-LLM方法，儘管使用了零標記訓練數據。
2604.17271.author: Ziqing Wang et.al.
